tree.name: Egor Demin
tree.note: BYU guard from Russia, drafted #8 overall. BKN reacquired their own 2025 1st from Houston to make this pick.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2025 1st Round Pick (#8)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Nets reacquired their own 2025 1st (negating HOU swap) and 2026 1st from Rockets. BKN sent PHX 2027 1st, PHX/HOU/OKC 2025 swap rights, and 2029 assets (two best of PHX/DAL/BKN).
assetsGivenUp.note: BKN's own pick was owed to Houston from the Harden mega-trade. Nets traded KD-trade-derived PHX picks to get it back.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2027 1st Round Pick via PHX
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: One of four 1st-round picks acquired from Phoenix in the Kevin Durant trade.
assetsGivenUp.note: Acquired in KD trade, sent to Houston to reacquire BKN's own picks.

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Durant
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Sign-and-trade: Nets traded D'Angelo Russell, Treveon Graham, and Shabazz Napier to Warriors for Kevin Durant. Conditional 2020 1st did not convey; became 2025 2nd (Javon Small).
assetsGivenUp.note: 4x scoring champ, 2x Finals MVP. Signed with BKN as FA, structured as sign-and-trade with GSW.

assetsGivenUp.name: D'Angelo Russell
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Nets traded Brook Lopez and the #27 pick (Kyle Kuzma) to Lakers for D'Angelo Russell and Timofey Mozgov.
assetsGivenUp.note: Young guard, traded from LAL alongside Mozgov's contract. Became All-Star in Brooklyn.

assetsGivenUp.name: Brook Lopez
assetsGivenUp.note: Drafted #10 overall by New Jersey Nets in 2008. Franchise cornerstone for a decade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2017 1st Round Pick (#27 via pick swap)
assetsGivenUp.note: BKN had the worst record in 2017 (#1 pick), but owed it to BOS from the KG/Pierce trade. BOS swapped #1 to PHI for #3 (Jayson Tatum). BKN got BOS's pick position (#27) via the swap. LAL drafted Kyle Kuzma.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2017 1st Round Pick (#1 overall)
assetsGivenUp.note: BKN's own pick — worst record in NBA, #1 overall. Owed to BOS from the 2013 KG/Pierce trade. BOS traded #1 to PHI for #3 (Jayson Tatum) and a future 1st. PHI drafted Markelle Fultz.

assetsGivenUp.name: Treveon Graham
assetsGivenUp.note: Signed as free agent by BKN. Sent to GSW in KD sign-and-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Shabazz Napier
assetsGivenUp.note: UConn guard, signed as free agent by BKN (2yr deal, July 2018). Sent to GSW in KD sign-and-trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: 2029 1st Round Picks (two best of PHX/DAL/BKN)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Acquired from Phoenix in Kevin Durant trade as part of the pick package.
assetsGivenUp.note: 2029 assets from KD trade, sent to Houston to reacquire BKN's own picks.
